description: Cancer Ecology Digital Twin (CEDT) state-space schema. Defines the five twin layers and their typed state-variable records. Used by Phase 6 CEDT adapters to map ExposoGraph 3.0 module outputs into the twin architecture.

state_variables.label: Exposure Intensity
state_variables.description: Dimensionless exposure multiplier vs unexposed baseline, derived from scenario-specific multiplier_vs_baseline for the carcinogen class. Higher values indicate greater carcinogenic exposure burden.

state_variables.label: Raw Exposure Multiplier
state_variables.description: Numeric multiplier_vs_baseline value from the Exposure module, directly passed as a twin state value.

state_variables.label: Carcinogen Exposure Class
state_variables.description: Controlled vocabulary identifier for the carcinogen class active in this scenario (e.g. PAH, Aflatoxin, AromaticAmines, Nitrosamine).
state_variables.source_hint: EG3.MOD.EXPOSURE.WAVE2.v1 input carcinogen_class, resolved per scenario

state_variables.label: Exposure Duration Context
state_variables.description: Categorical exposure scenario identifier (e.g. smoker, general_population, developing_country_moderate) that encodes duration and intensity context.

state_variables.label: Tissue Context Identifier
state_variables.description: Controlled tissue identifier (Liver, Lung, Bladder, etc.) specifying the target organ for this twin state vector.

state_variables.label: Tissue Expression Weight (mean)
state_variables.description: Mean normalized gene expression weight across enzymes relevant to the scenario, derived from GTEx-normalized tissue weights used in the Flux engine. Represents tissue-specific enzymatic context.
state_variables.source_hint: EG3.MOD.TISSUE.SUBGRAPH.v1 output_port: tissue_expression_weight; averaged over per_enzyme_mm_rates

state_variables.label: Tissue Sensitivity Index
state_variables.description: Max tissue expression weight among enzymes in the scenario, serving as a proxy for peak tissue susceptibility. Derived from the same GTEx weights as tissue_expression_weight.
state_variables.source_hint: EG3.MOD.TISSUE.SUBGRAPH.v1; max of tissue_weight across per_enzyme_mm_rates

state_variables.label: Metabolic Activation Score
state_variables.description: Summed weighted Michaelis-Menten activation flux: Σ(Vmax·[S]/(Km+[S])) × tissue_weight × genotype_multiplier for all activation enzymes. Directly from the Flux engine output.

state_variables.label: Metabolic Detoxification Score
state_variables.description: Summed weighted Michaelis-Menten detoxification flux for all detox enzymes. Directly from the Flux engine output.

state_variables.label: Metabolic Flux Ratio
state_variables.description: Ratio of activation_score to detoxification_score (guarded at min 0.001). Values >1 indicate net activation predominance. Core regression-tested output of the Flux module. Direct identity mapping from flux_ratio.

state_variables.label: GSH Pool Fraction
state_variables.description: Remaining fraction of the glutathione (GSH) pool relative to the 7.5 mM baseline. Exported by the Interaction module; reflects co-exposure GSH depletion. Null if INTERACTION module not run.

state_variables.label: Enzyme Activity Modifier (per gene)
state_variables.description: Per-gene genotype activity multiplier from the PopGen module (PM=0.0, IM=0.5, NM=1.0, RM=1.5, UM=2.0, or null-allele=0.0). Stored as a dict keyed by gene symbol. Multiple enzymes may be present per scenario.

state_variables.label: Susceptibility Index
state_variables.description: Composite susceptibility index derived from the mean genotype activity multiplier across enzymes in the scenario. Values >1.0 indicate elevated susceptibility; <1.0 indicates reduced activation or enhanced detoxification.
state_variables.source_hint: EG3.MOD.MODIFIER.POPGEN.v1; mean of genotype_multiplier across per_enzyme_mm_rates

state_variables.label: Oxidative Stress Level
state_variables.description: Aggregate reactive oxygen species burden score. Populated only when OxStress module runs (i.e., when ROS_burden input is provided). Null for standard Exposure→Flux→MutSig scenarios where OxStress was not activated.
state_variables.source_hint: EG3.MOD.MECHANISM.OXSTRESS.v1 output_port: ROS_burden (null if module not run)

state_variables.label: Adduct Burden Score
state_variables.description: Predicted oxidative DNA adduct score (8-OHdG / Oxo-dG type). Derived from OxStress module output. Null when OxStress did not run in a given scenario.
state_variables.source_hint: EG3.MOD.MECHANISM.OXSTRESS.v1 output_port: oxidative_adduct_score (null if module not run)

state_variables.label: Predicted Mutational Signature(s)
state_variables.description: List of COSMIC SBS signature identifiers predicted for this scenario (e.g. ['SBS4', 'SBS92', 'SBS18']). Primary output of the MutSig module, regression-tested against golden run.

state_variables.label: Dominant Mutation Type
state_variables.description: Predicted dominant mutation category for the primary SBS signature (e.g. 'C>A transversions'). Directly from MutSig module output.

state_variables.label: Evidence Confidence
state_variables.description: Categorical confidence tier (high | medium | exploratory) from the MutSig module's flux_ratio-governed confidence rule. Also informed by provenance quality from the Evidence module.
